rulings.Case Title: DAVID BRYAN VS. U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS TRUSTEE FOR J.P. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Second Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 7, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANT U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS TRUSTEE FOR J.P. MORGAN ALTERNATIVE LOAN TRUST 2007-A2'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Second Amended Complaint Under Seal. Grant. Exhibit to Second Amended Complaint and any subsequent filngs subject to protective order of May 14, 2012, shall be filed under seal. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH LEE et al VS. NARANJIBHAI R PATEL et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 7, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANTs NARANJIBHAI PATEL and INDIRABEN PATEL's AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Off Calendar, untimely per CRC 3.1320(d), i.e., beyond 35 days. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN FLOOD et al VS. JAMES YOUNG et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 7, 2012, line 3. DEFENDANTs JAMES YOUNG and BETTY YOUNG's AMENDED MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. Deny, defendants failed to carry burdern showing "notice of rent increase," is protected by CCP 425.16(e)(1)or(2), per Ruiz CCP 425.16(e)(1)&(2) are parallel to litigation privilege. Per Bisno notice insufficient re contemplation of litigation. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE ACQUISITION, LLC, A VS. DAN LU et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn And Ntc Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption And Ntc Of Oppos; Memo Of P & A And Pos
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 7, 2012, line 4. PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE ACQUISITION, LLC's Hearing On Claim Of Exemption. Hearing required. Burden on claimant to provide folliwng competent evidence, 1) Not spouse of Judgment Debtor; 2) Money in account levied upon is her separate property; 3) Judgment Debtor not on account on date of levy. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CESAR A MONTES VS. LOGAN LAUGHLIN
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 7, 2012, line 5. DEFENDANT LOGAN LAUGHLIN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustain with leave to amend to conform complaint to notice re Room 2 and allege if premises subject to rent ordinance. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ALLAN FU-KEUNG YEE VS. WAI SHING YEUNG et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 7, 2012, line 6. DEFENDANTs WAI YEUNG, and LAI NG's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Hearing required. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ALLAN FU-KEUNG YEE VS. WAI SHING YEUNG et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, November 7, 2012, line 6. DEFENDANT WING YEUNG's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Hearing required. = (501/REQ)
